steps.title: Use the variety clues
steps.content: The sentence lists different leaf-vein architectures and later refers to a “range of adaptations.” The blank must describe the fact that these architectures are numerous and varied.

steps.title: Reject wrong meanings
steps.content: B means stubbornness, which is not at issue. C suggests tangling or complication rather than variety. D means blame, which has no role in the passage. A word for many different forms fits the examples. The answer is A.
